nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_detail: Rain. Cloudy. High near 50, with temperatures falling to around 45 in the afternoon. East wind 14 to 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
